name: Impossible Herbs 'n Onion Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bacon - crisp fried and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. In a skillet, cook onions in butter for about 10 minutes, stirring frequently, until they are softened.
4. Arrange half of the onions evenly in the pie plate and sprinkle with half of the bacon.
5. Cover with remaining onions and bacon.
6. In a blender container, mix milk, Worcestershire sauce, eggs, and Bisquick. Blend on high for 15 seconds.
7. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
8. Mix herbs in a small bowl and crush slightly. Sprinkle evenly over the milk mixture.
9. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.
FOR 2 SERVINGS:
1. Grease two 10-ounce custard cups.
2. Reduce onions to 1 ring, butter to 2 tablespoons, bacon to 4 slices, milk to 1/2 cup, Worcestershire sauce to 1/2 teaspoon, eggs to 1, and Bisquick to 1/4 cup.
3. Bake for 10 minutes at high altitude (increase baking time by 5 minutes if not baking at high altitude).
